ships.name: Shio Firebird
ships.description: The age old design of the Firebird was once one of the most common ships during the Alpha Wars. As such it was one of the few designs the Humans that fled to Sheragi space had access to. After half a millennium this ship has recieved heavy design tweaks to make it better able to stand up against the Behemoth Sheragi warships.

ships.name: Shio Leviathan
ships.description: The Leviathan has been in service for a long time, and with 500 years of extra development alongside Sheragi ships this ship is now capable of holding its own against some of the smaller Sheragi warships.

ships.name: Dromedary
ships.description: The Tycho Crater Cooperative's Dromedary was one of the foremost colonization ships during the early era before piracy became rampant and triggered the necessity for city-ships to be more combat-oriented. These ships incorporate extensive hydroponics, large construction equipment installations, and hundreds of densely packed "dream cells" built to transport people in bulk.

ships.name: Llama
ships.description: The Llama is pushing the bounds of what can be considered a fighter by Human standards. It was created when it became apparant that a fighter needed to not immediateley disintegrate from a stray Sheragi shot. So that the model would never become obsolete, Shio Industries took inspiration from the Mule and decided to put a little bit of everything into this fighter, resulting in its bizarre appearance. 	Fighters do not come equipped with a hyperdrive. You cannot carry a fighter unless you have a ship in your fleet with a fighter bay.

ships.name: Platinum Spear :SRR
ships.description: A powerful Sheragi warship designed to break through enemy lines. The few flaws in its design are made up for by its immense size, making it one of the most powerful warships you've ever seen. With the collaboration between Human and Sheragi engineering this ship is the the most efficient warship in the Sheragi arsenal.

ships.name: Gold Shield :SRR
ships.description: A powerful Sheragi carrier designed to quickly deploy fighters to swarm enemy ships. The ship comes equipped with a more powerful version of the repair system the Black Diamonds use. This increases its survivability, providing time for the fighters to finish off the enemy.

ships.name: Opal Glaive :SRR
ships.description: For its original Sheragi masters, this warship was home to around 100 individuals. For others, however, that number more than doubles, bringing it on par with the largest city ships.

ships.name: Bronze Edge :SRR
ships.description: The Sheragi, despite being large creatures have managed to create a warship of relatively small size. It has space for passengers while still remaining, somehow, functional.

ships.name: Ruby Hammer :SRR
ships.description: This Sheragi freighter outclasses any other freighter merely through its size. The Ruby Hammer was designed to cross the empty and dangerous space full of ion storms seperating Eden in two. Its unique hull shape helps provide some ion resistance.

ships.name: White Brand :SRR
ships.description: This Sheragi warship is the mainstay of the Sheragi military, providing the combat power neccesary while remaining cost effective enough that it can be present in numbers within the battlefield.

variants.name: Scout (Shio)
variants.description: The Lionheart Scoutship was designed back in the days when the galaxy was more sparsely populated, and ships prospecting for habitable worlds or worlds rich in resources would often travel far away from any habitable ports where they would be able to refuel. Although the galaxy has now been much more thoroughly explored, the Scout remains a popular ship for long-distance travel.

variants.name: Scout (Eden)
variants.description: The Lionheart Scoutship was designed back in the days when the galaxy was more sparsely populated, and ships prospecting for habitable worlds or worlds rich in resources would often travel far away from any habitable ports where they would be able to refuel. Although the galaxy has now been much more thoroughly explored, the Scout remains a popular ship for long-distance travel.

variants.name: Berserker (Shio)
variants.description: Once one of the most popular interceptor-class ships, the Berserker's popularity is now waning in favor of more modern and versatile ships like the Hawk. Although limited numbers are still produced by Betelgeuse Shipyards, most Berserkers that are in service today are more than half a century old.

variants.name: Berserker (Eden)
variants.description: Once one of the most popular interceptor-class ships, the Berserker's popularity is now waning in favor of more modern and versatile ships like the Hawk. Although limited numbers are still produced by Betelgeuse Shipyards, most Berserkers that are in service today are more than half a century old.

variants.name: Aerie (Shio)
variants.description: The Lionheart Aerie is a light carrier, designed to be just big enough for four fighter bays plus a decent armament of its own. Variations on this same ship design have been in use in the Deep for almost half a millennium, but this model comes with the very latest in generator and weapon technology.

variants.name: Aerie (Eden)
variants.description: The Lionheart Aerie is a light carrier, designed to be just big enough for four fighter bays plus a decent armament of its own. Variations on this same ship design have been in use in the Deep for almost half a millennium, but this model comes with the very latest in generator and weapon technology.

variants.name: Mule (Shio)
variants.description: The Mule is as much of a hodgepodge as its looks suggest. The Lionheart ship designers combined a good deal of cargo space with a decent amount of weaponry and even a fighter bay, and ended up with a ship that is mostly used as a freighter but can also be used as a warship because of its heavy armament and shields. This hodgepodge nature has its downside, though, namely its high crew requirement and the fact that any dedicated ship of the same cost will do better in a specialized role than the Mule will.

variants.name: Mule (Eden)
variants.description: The Mule is as much of a hodgepodge as its looks suggest. The Lionheart ship designers combined a good deal of cargo space with a decent amount of weaponry and even a fighter bay, and ended up with a ship that is mostly used as a freighter but can also be used as a warship because of its heavy armament and shields. This hodgepodge nature has its downside, though, namely its high crew requirement and the fact that any dedicated ship of the same cost will do better in a specialized role than the Mule will.

variants.name: Bactrian (Eden)
variants.description: The Lionheart Bactrian is the last of the great city-ships, a design hearkening back to the early days of space colonization when a long-distance vessel needed to be a self-contained world, able to survive for weeks at a time without encountering an inhabited planet. It is not only a freighter, but a carrier, and a capable warship either at short range or at a distance. 	Naturally, this versatility also makes it extremely expensive, and the Bactrian is normally only for sale to citizens who have been vetted by the local government of the Deep.

variants.name: Emerald Sword (Modern) :SRR
variants.description: An ancient Sheragi warship that was crewed by mutineers that fled from their civil war and escaped into interstellar space. Found orbiting a disconnected star, this is an impressively large ship, fit for the equally large Sheragi. The ship's main weapon is a fusion-pumped gamma-ray laser called the 'Dragonflame Cannon.' Despite the relatively primitive outfits, it's still a very capable war machine due to its size. For its original Sheragi masters, this warship was home to around 100 individuals. For others, however, that number more than doubles, bringing it on par with the largest city ships.

variants.name: Opal Glaive :SRR (Opal Glaive (Light) :SRR)
variants.description: For its original Sheragi masters, this warship was home to around 100 individuals. For others, however, that number more than doubles, bringing it on par with the largest city ships.

variants.name: Opal Glaive :SRR (Opal Glaive (Shadow) :SRR)
variants.description: For its original Sheragi masters, this warship was home to around 100 individuals. For others, however, that number more than doubles, bringing it on par with the largest city ships.

outfits.name: SRR Small EM Battery
outfits.description: This small superconductive inductor stores just enough power to keep a fighter running, and the electromagnetic field it generates helps to maintain the shield matrix.

outfits.name: SRR Large EM Battery
outfits.description: This is a massive superconductive coil, capable of storing large amounts of energy in an electromagnetic field and discharging all of it in a fraction of a second. The magnetic field also provides a small boost to the shield regeneration of the ship, which is otherwise very underdeveloped.

outfits.name: SRR Small Hybrid Cooling
outfits.description: This small cooling solution was designed with fighters in mind, and as such, it does not store fuel. However, it provides more passive cooling than its big brother.

outfits.name: SRR Large Hybrid Cooling
outfits.description: This Sheragi cooling system is primitive at best, but it works both actively and passively, allowing it to dissipate much more heat than a simple radiator would. It does, however, drain a lot of power when subjected to the heat of battle. It also includes cryogenic tanks to hold some additional fuel, which is used as a temporary heat reservoir.

outfits.name: SRR Aeleos Drive
outfits.description: A much smaller cousin of the Fusion Drive, it relies on fission instead of fusion to function, providing the necessary power generation and thrust to drive the Heavy Ion Cyclotron.

outfits.name: SRR Aolilatse Drive
outfits.description: The Sheragi engines are much more than simple tubes spewing fire; they are a collection of interdependent devices, providing increased efficiency at the cost of modularity. These include a hyperdrive, an enormous fusion reactor, and the most powerful plasma engines you've ever seen. It's all examples of relatively simple technology, but they have been refined and taken to their extreme. The engines are fundamentally connected to the fusion reactor, increasing their thrust even further and thereby allowing the Emerald Sword to fly at impressive speeds, traveling through interstellar space with relative ease.

outfits.name: SRR Electronic Warfare System
outfits.description: This device provides radar jamming and a whole suite of electronic warfare, gathering data about the battlefield in real time and enhancing a ship's combat capabilities. It was an essential item for every Sheragi warship, and the technique it uses is still difficult to counter to this very day.

outfits.name: SRR Dragonflame Cannon
outfits.description: The ancient Sheragi superweapon is simple in concept, but the cost involved in developing something like it is exorbitant. It's hard to envision what could have motivated the creation of such a thing. It uses an obscene amount of energy to trigger an extremely powerful thermonuclear reaction, directing most of the energy from the resulting explosion forwards in a devastatingly powerful beam of gamma radiation.

outfits.name: SRR Sheragi Anti-Missile
outfits.description: The Sheragi Anti-Missile fires an extremely powerful laser pulse capable of obliterating any missile in a single shot, but it comes at the expense of a long recharge time.

outfits.name: SRR Particle Waveform Turret
outfits.description: This ancient Sheragi turret accelerates a dense packet of electrons that, while very ineffective against any kind of shielding, has a very long range and disrupts electrical systems. By the nature of these weapons, one can deduce that their tactics likely involved using the Dragonflame Cannon at long range to break the enemy shields and finishing them off at relatively close range with the Particle Waveform Turrets.

outfits.name: SRR Shard Fabricator
outfits.description: To reduce reliance on supply chains during prolonged war time, this outfit contains specialized fabricators that produce simple kinetic missiles from stock materials and a small amount of stored fuel; their guidance system merely receives data from the shipboard radar. The missiles are fired in volleys of six at a time from each launcher, making them very effective at overwhelming point defenses despite their fragility. However, the low amount of fuel they carry means they can only home in on the target for about a second before they turn into unguided ammunition. Because they are manufactured on the spot, it takes a long time to reload.

outfits.name: SRR Heavy Ion Cyclotron
outfits.description: The main weapon of the Sheragi fighters is a particle accelerator not unlike the ones used by the Republic Navy and the Syndicate. However, this one produces a dense stream of heavy metal ions instead of bursts of lighter ones, resulting in high damage with intense recoil. Because the particle accelerator itself can be mounted elsewhere, it saves on weapon space.

outfits.name: SRR Medium EM Battery
outfits.description: This medium superconductive inductor stores enough power to keep most ships running, and the electromagnetic field it generates helps to maintain the shield matrix.

outfits.name: SRR Drilgir Core
outfits.description: With the intergration of Humans into Sheragi space came the request for more compatible technology, the Sheragi's solution was to simply sell fission drives without the engine components as alternatives to some of the Human reactors available. However, some Sheragi have begun adopting the tactic of greater energy generation in favour of large batteries.

outfits.name: SRR Ethimir Core
outfits.description: With the intergration of Humans into Sheragi space came the request for more compatible technology, the Sheragi's solution was to simply sell fission drives without the engine components as alternatives to some of the Human reactors available. However, some Sheragi have begun adopting the tactic of greater energy generation in favour of large batteries.

outfits.name: SRR Letnir Core
outfits.description: This is by far the largest reactor you have ever seen, so large in fact that you don't think it would be practical to fit on any human ship. This reactor is a modified version of the Fusion Drive that powers the Sheragi's large capital ships.

outfits.name: SRR Vishmixenir Core
outfits.description: This is by far the largest reactor you have ever seen, so large in fact that you don't think it would be practical to fit on any human ship. This reactor is a modified version of the Fusion Drive that powers the Sheragi's large capital ships.

outfits.name: SRR Solar Intake
outfits.description: When faced with the possibility of becoming stranded between the habitable zones of their new territory the Sheragi developed a multipurpose solar and ramscoop collection panel

outfits.name: SRR Medium Hybrid Cooling
outfits.description: This cooling system was designed to cater for the sheragi's intensive heat needs. Additionally it serves as a fuel system to further the fuel capacity of sheragi ships.

outfits.name: SRR Osvith Drive
outfits.description: The Sheragi Scram Drive was developed to be used in conjunction with the Fusion Afterburner, allowing it to function similiar to a Scram Drive but without the increased fuel cost.

outfits.name: SRR Santhilia Drive
outfits.description: This large complex engine is fission powered, resulting in a massive amount of energy to drive heavy ships forwards.

outfits.name: SRR Xarlaxe Drive
outfits.description: A smaller version of the Sheragi fusion drive designed for medium warships.

outfits.name: SRR Beithir Afterburner
outfits.description: The Sheragi's first forays into space travel involved the use of fission and fusion powered thrusters similiar to this afterburner, this developed the basis of all of their future engine technologies. 	The key note about the Sheragi's original Fusion Afterburners was that they resulted in the Sheragi's development of the Hyperdrive by use of the afterburner as a reaction chamber.

outfits.name: SRR Fusion Power Converter
outfits.description: This simple attachment for the Fusion Afterburner recycles some of the generated energy back into the afterburner, increasing the thrust output. However, as this is mutually exclusive to the Sheragi Hyperdrive it is usually only used on larger ships that use Fusion Drives or madmen that install multiple afterburners.

outfits.name: SRR Plasma Thrower
outfits.description: This is essentially a wrist mounted flamethrower that spews superheated plasma. It truly makes the Sheragi seem like the dragons of Human fantasy. The wrist mechanism is too big for your tiny human hands, but it works just fine hand held.

outfits.name: SRR Light Particle Shielding
outfits.description: This shielding system was initialy developed to combat the ion storms splitting the middle of the new Sheragi territory. However upon discovering its effectiveness at reducing ion damage from Particle Waveform Cannons the Sheragi refined and improved the design allowing the charged particles to release absorbed energy into the ship's power systems, unleashing a new wave of warfare. One should be careful not to let the shield matrix of a ship using this system fully deplete as the resulting discharge will short circuit the capacitor, shutting down the system and resulting in a lengthy reboot.

outfits.name: SRR Dense Particle Shielding
outfits.description: This Sheragi shield device was developed to further the shield matrices and ion resistance in the new age of warship technology spurred on by its weaker predecessor. The energy boost provided by this shield can be used to gain an edge in combat where ion attacks are involved. One should be careful not to let the shield matrix of a ship using this system fully deplete as the resulting discharge will short circuit the capacitor, shutting down the system and resulting in a lengthy reboot.

outfits.name: Sheragi License
outfits.description: A license that will allow you to purchase most of the Sheragi's technology and ships

outfits.name: Sheragi Capital License
outfits.description: A license that will allow you to purchase the Sheragi's most powerful technology and ships

outfits.name: Quantum Energy Field
outfits.description: This field of quantum energy was placed around your ship by an Archon to allow you to travel through unstable wormholes. It is best you do so quickly as there is no way of knowing how long the field will last.

outfits.name: SRR Shadow's Blade
outfits.description: The Sheragi are a warlike race, even now when they are secluded from the rest of the galaxy they are driven to develop weapons of utter devestation. This prototype weapon was designed to deal massive hull damage, to be used in conjunction with its sister ship's weapon.

outfits.name: SRR Light's Bane
outfits.description: The Sheragi are a warlike race, even now when they are secluded from the rest of the galaxy they are driven to develop weapons of utter devestation. This prototype weapon was designed to disrupt enemy shields, to be used in conjunction with its sister ship's weapon.

outfits.name: SRR Pulse Beam
outfits.description: This beam weapon was created in conjunction between Human and Sheragi engineers by altering the ancient but powerful design of the Sheragi Anti-Missile. It is more balanced in its effectiveness at damaging shields than most Sheragi weaponry, as influenced by the existence of shield reliant Human ships. Despite its immense power, one should beware of the high energy cost of this weapon.

outfits.name: SRR Pulse Beam Turret
outfits.description: This beam turret is the peak of standard Sheragi weaponry, balanced in its effectiveness at damaging both shields and hull. One should beware the high energy cost of this weapon and the difficulty installing a weapon of such a size.

outfits.name: SRR Particle Waveform Cannon
outfits.description: This ancient Sheragi cannon has been in use for thousands of years and still is effective in combat today. It works by accelerating a dense packet of electrons that, while very ineffective against any kind of shielding, have a very long range and disrupts electrical systems.

outfits.name: SRR Kinetic Spear
outfits.description: A Kinetic Spear is ammunition for the Kinetic Spear Launcher; without a Launcher to store them in you cannot purchase or use Kinetic Spears.

outfits.name: SRR Kinetic Spear Rack
outfits.description: This rack is used to store extra ammunition for Kinetic Spear Launchers.

outfits.name: SRR Kinetic Spear Launcher
outfits.description: The Sheragi Kinetic Spear Launcher is a weapon designed to rip through the hulls of ships. The weapon fires a large unguided tungsten rod which completley penetrates shields. The fact it is made of solid metal makes this weapon very difficult to shoot down with standard Anti-Missile systems.

outfits.name: Sheragi War Manuscript
outfits.description: An ancient Sheragi manuscript dating back to the Sheragi civil war containing numerous battle tactics for protecting against incoming attacks. It was gifted to you by Izkagg, a Sheragi warrior you helped.
